project.title: FileCabinet
project.description: Local-first Windows desktop vault for retaining, cataloging, previewing, verifying, and recovering high-signal technical artifacts.

produces: docs/FileCabinet v1.4.4 — Neon Ink Theme Patch.md
consumes: User-selected files and folders for vault ingestion
Existing vault item files during rescan

datasets.name: FileCabinet catalog
datasets.description: Local JSON catalog containing vault metadata, artifact records, tags, categories, hashes, extracted text paths, thumbnail paths, activities, and UI preferences.

datasets.name: FileCabinet vault
datasets.description: Portable retained artifact storage containing items, thumbnails, extracted text, quarantine, and exports.

scripts.name: installer/build-installer.ps1
scripts.role: Publishes the self-contained Windows x64 build and creates the WiX MSI installer.

automation.deploy: Publish artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.4.4.0-win-x64.msi to the GitHub v1.4.4 release.
tasks: Build self-contained Windows x64 publish output
Include release notes from docs/FileCabinet v1.4.4 — Neon Ink Theme Patch.md

notes.release_name: FileCabinet v1.4.4 — Neon Ink Theme Patch
v1_4_4_highlights: Neon Ink theme resources now live in a dedicated WPF ResourceDictionary
MainWindow uses shared theme brushes instead of inline palette resources
Cyan navigation fills were darkened for readable selected-row and route text
Violet, purple, pink, magenta, orange, green, yellow, and red semantic accents are used across process, preview, metadata, build, health, attention, and risk states
Preview and activity accents were refreshed to match Neon Ink semantics
Application, CLI, installer default, and manifest version updated to 1.4.4
not_in_scope: Destructive cleanup of orphan generated assets
design_boundaries: Repairable local vault state over cloud dependency
notes.last_verified: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj passed 79 tests on 2026-06-01; installer/build-installer.ps1 -Version 1.4.4.0 completed on 2026-06-01
